hooks.command: cat "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/CONSTITUTION.md"; echo; echo "[agent-rules] Situation（Constitution 內文說何時讀）: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/DECISIONS.md ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/SAFETY.md ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/ANTIPATTERNS.md"; J="${JUDGMENT_DIR:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/judgment}"; if [ -f "$J/INDEX.md" ]; then echo; sed "s|@JUDGMENT@|$J|g" "$J/INDEX.md"; fi
